source.description: Revert PR 61928
LEGO: Pull request from lego/hb_5378966c-b857-470a-8675-daebef4a6da1_20251031193321730 to main
🤖 Pick PR #62604 (Propagate variance reliability) into tsgo-port
Propagate variance reliability
Apply tsgo PR 1987 to tsgo-port
LEGO: Pull request from lego/hb_5378966c-b857-470a-8675-daebef4a6da1_20251030193607558 to main
fix: make separate object instance for each environment
feat: update rolldown to 1.0.0-rc.18
chore(deps): update rolldown-related dependencies
refactor: remove unnecessary async
refactor: devtools integration
fix: avoid destructure lowering for newer safari
Update flow-parser
Update yarn to v4.14
Update Docusaurus to v3.10.1
Update CodeMirror
Update dependency @angular/compiler to v21.2.12
Update dependency oxc-parser to v0.129.0
chore: replace `recast` with range approach in code-sample-minimizer
test: disable warning for `vm.constants.USE_MAIN_CONTEXT_DEFAULT_LOADER`
refactor: remove deprecated `meta.language` and migrate `meta.dialects`
refactor: add `meta.defaultOptions` to more rules, enable linting
test: add unit tests for lib/shared/ast-utils
fix: handle non-array deprecated rule replacements
feat(pretty-format): support React 19
fix(expect-utils): handle cross-realm constructors in toStrictEqual
fix(expect-utils): iterableEquality should not throw on exotic iterables
fix(fake-timers): convert Date to milliseconds before passing to @sinonjs/fake-timers
fix: allow `collectCoverage` and `coverageProvider` in project config
fix(jest-circus): prevent crash when asyncError is undefined for non-Error throws
Fix `navigator` not defined `ReferenceError`
Update `supports-color` to 9.4.0
update supports-color
Fix exported styles names
Export styles from `ansi-styles`
Expose styles as variables
chore(deps): revert update rust crate mimalloc to 0.1.50
fix(fmt/md): remove trailing spaces in markdown lists
fix(formatter): flush indentation after align end
perf: reduced queries in rules
feat(lint/js/vue): add `useVueNextTickPromise`
feat(css_formatter): improve formatting SCSS function arguments with trailing commas
fix(ext/node): drive TLSWrap cycle on JSStream writes to fix deadlock
perf(ext/node): convert more polyfills to lazy-loaded JS
fix(ext/node): emit diagnostics_channel events for HTTP server
perf(ext/node): convert more polyfills to lazy-loaded JS
fix(ext/node): improve module hooks support
perf(ext/node): convert more polyfills to lazy-loaded JS
[Fiber] track stylesheet preloads when explicitly preloaded
[FlightReply] Type hardening and performance improvements
[DevTools] Don't connect to pages that are being prerendered
[DevTools] Preserve -Infinity in inspected values
fix(devtools): clear highlight when mouse leaves DevTools panel
[Flight] Add more cycle protections
Hold `cacheSignal` across `unstable_cache` foreground revalidation
Turbopack: Change DynEffect::dyn_value to DynEffect::value_hash, a simple u128
Track `searchParams` access through a Proxy to catch missing-key reads
[backport] Disable build caches for production/staging/force-preview deploys
fix(v4): align .merge() with .extend() refinement semantics
fix(v4): cidrv6 JSON schema pattern matches runtime
fix(v4): break circular import between classic schemas and iso (#5275)
fix(v4): allow dynamic `.catch()` under `unrepresentable: "any"` (#5273)
fix(v4): generalize optin/fallback to transform; restore preprocess on absent keys
Tighten discriminated union option typing
Harden against prototype pollution
Document support for multiple inputs
Ensure all `d.ts` files are considered as ESM
Fix CI tests related to `.kill(0)`
Fix CI tests
Fix Node 24-specific deprecation warning
Stream decoding of large bodies
Allow specifying `undefined` for options
Fix timeout error firing even though it's cancelled
fix: correct support for AbortSignal:timeout()
Fix "Unknown HTTP2 promise event"
feat: allow typing the body of a RequestError response
autoescape selection uses case-insensitive comparison
add zizmor to scan workflows
all teardown callbacks are called despite errors
Release 8.3.3
add codespell pre-commit hook
Fix sentinel typing and its uses in parser
Add file-like pager: `click.get_pager_file()`
Apply format guidelines to commits since latest 8.3.2 release
Move Commands-and-Groups doc from reST to MyST
Fix Argument.__repr__ crash when _action is not initialized
Stop using `atexit` and add integration tests for `tmpdir` fixture
fixtures: fix parametrization losing (static) transitive dependencies from overridden fixtures
update Pytester.LineMatcher._no_match_line docstring
[automated] Update plugin list
Add a space after the test name with `--setup-show`
docs: update stale Sphinx link in contributing guide
test: add two more tests exercising the adapter
Add tests for hasattr/getattr usage on LookupDict
Create groups for GHA and pre-commit dependabot PRs
Update index.rst to match README info
Prepare Tokio v1.47.5
